_comment: Provenance manifest for the feature-detection eval tiles (ADR-006). One entry per pulled nadir tile. Mapbox imagery is © Mapbox/Maxar (not public domain) — reference tiles by this recorded provenance and do not assume they are freely redistributable. Generated/extended by pull_tiles.py; the seed entries below are SAMPLES the human replaces with real pulled tiles during manual setup. tile_id is the stable key shared with labels.json.
